topic: I took a wrong turn on a back road and ended up in the same town twice
title: I Took a Wrong Turn on a Back Road and Ended Up in the Same Town Twice | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: I was driving home from my sister's place in late November.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a two-lane rural highway at dusk, flat farmland on both sides, bare trees lining the shoulder, a single pair of headlights visible far ahead in the lane, low overcast sky, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Missed a turn. Took a county road I did not recognize.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot through a windshield at night of a narrow county road cutting through dark fields, no road markings visible, the headlights illuminating only a short distance ahead, tree line on both sides, no other lights, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Small town. One main street. Gas station. Grain elevator.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a small midwestern main street at night, a few commercial buildings with dim signage, a grain elevator silhouette against the dark sky at the end of the street, one streetlamp lit, no moving vehicles, no pedestrians, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I noted the water tower. Harwick. Population eight forty.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot looking up at a white municipal water tower against a dark sky, the town name painted in faded block letters on the tank, a red aviation light blinking at the top, flat rural dark around the base, vertical 9:16 framing

interior shot through a car windshield of a rural two-lane road at night, the last few buildings of a small town receding in the rear view, headlights illuminating the empty road ahead, darkness closing in on both sides, vertical 9:16 framing

wide shot of the same small midwestern main street at night, the same grain elevator silhouette, the same single lit streetlamp, the same arrangement of buildings, seen from the exact same angle as before, no movement, vertical 9:16 framing

close shot looking up at the same white water tower against the same dark sky, the name in the same faded block letters, the red light blinking at the top, identical composition to the first pass, vertical 9:16 framing

close shot of a car dashboard compass in the center console showing a consistent eastward heading, the needle steady, the surrounding dashboard lit by instrument glow, dark windshield ahead, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I stopped at the gas station. Same attendant. He did not react when I said I had just been here.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a small rural gas station at night from across the forecourt, a single figure visible in the lit interior behind the counter, two pumps in the foreground, the station sign glowing against the dark sky, no other cars, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He slid my receipt across the counter. The timestamp read four hours earlier.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a small paper receipt lying on a gas station counter under fluorescent light, the printed timestamp at the top visible, a hand sliding it forward, the edge of a register visible at the corner of the frame, vertical 9:16 framing

interior shot from the back seat of a car in motion on a dark rural highway at night, the road ahead lit by headlights, the driver visible only as a silhouette in the front seat, no other lights on the road, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I looked up Harwick when I got home. No results. No county record.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a laptop screen in a dark room showing a search results page with no results, the glow of the screen on the surrounding desk, a coffee cup beside the laptop, the room behind completely dark, vertical 9:16 framing
